[{"Name":"Kelly Pitt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXao0gyjv8lxGUQDEQZSeLCzw_7dBDDEkwFmFHzTlMlS1uJQuE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Javen Simon Roofing, recently completed the full roof replacement on all four buildings within our complex. From start to finish, their team demonstrated exceptional professionalism, outstanding workmanship, and meticulous attention to detail.

Of the three quotes we received, Jake Jacobson from Javen Simon Roofing was the only one who took the time to thoroughly inspect each of our four buildings. He also met with the strata council to review the contract in detail and was readily available to address the many questions and concerns we had throughout the planning process.

The project was completed on schedule and within the agreed-upon budget. Their crew was consistently punctual, respectful, and well-organized, ensuring minimal disruption to our residents. Communication was excellent; Ivan kept us informed at every stage of the project, and any questions we raised were answered promptly and clearly.

The completed roofs look exceptional and were finished to a standard that gives us complete confidence in their durability and long-term performance. The crew also maintained a clean and safe worksite throughout the entire project, which we greatly appreciated.

We would not hesitate to recommend Javin Simon Roofing for any roofing project, large or small. Their professionalism, integrity, and commitment to high-quality workmanship made this a smooth and successful experience from beginning to end.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sheri Reed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYTwsecsNROhydXtly4Opafya521Qj8BOWSiyMKZ13Ad5SSZPX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"May 2022 Javen Simon installed a new asphalt roof on our house, installed several more roof vents and significant improved our attic insulation while they were up there. Couldn't recommend enough!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Bailey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNluRKZ3uFG1tJxzs_CF6XmflsWkJWoiCeMFa8RcCuT3YxdTehDw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re looking for honest, hard-working people who treat your roof like it’s their own, you’ve found them. Mark and Kathy are the kind of “salt of the earth” folks you wish every contractor could be - steady hands, easy smiles, and the kind of integrity that’s hard to come by these days.

Mark showed up exactly when he said he would (I think even my coffee was still brewing), and by the time they wrapped up, my place looked like it had stepped out of a home magazine—without any of the stress.
